sourceMovie.title: My Old Ass
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: My Old Ass (2024) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Megan Park's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Old Ass clicked for you, The Edge of Seventeen (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after My Old Ass?
faq.answer: Try The Edge of Seventeen, Love Don't Co$t a Thing, Barney's Version—each shares DNA with My Old Ass while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is My Old Ass?
faq.answer: My Old Ass (2024) is best described as Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is My Old Ass worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
